title: MCLN PULL_ZONE and PICK_DETRM_ZONE on oLPNs UI
fullText:
center 83548 Adding Reserve PULL_ZONE and PICK_DETERMINATION_ZONE to oLPNs UI Table of Contents Contents This document details the configuration steps needed to add PULL_ZONE and PICK_DETRM_ZONE to oLPNs UI as part of SF Case: 9052956 - Add PULL_ZONE and PICK_DETERM_ZONE to oLPNs UI . Allowing this to also populate on the FIRST ZONE column for oLPNs not utilizing zone picking. *N ote, there is no system code enablement for this change. * TOC \o \z \u \h 1. Item Inventory by Location UI Changes PAGEREF _Toc197591377 \h 3 1. oLPN UI Changes Open Filter Layout UI . Search LPN_OUTBOUND i n object Type. Select ‘Add’ Copy details below . PICK_DETRM_ZONE PULL_ZONE Save. Open Labor Dev Tools UI. Whap319 to login. Ctrl-F Clear Filter Layout Cache Open oLPNs UI to see changes.

[Document: MCLN PULL_ZONE and PICK_DETRM_ZONE on oLPNs UI]

center 83548 Adding Reserve PULL_ZONE and PICK_DETERMINATION_ZONE to oLPNs UI Table of Contents Contents This document details the configuration steps needed to add PULL_ZONE and PICK_DETRM_ZONE to oLPNs UI as part of SF Case: 9052956 - Add PULL_ZONE and PICK_DETERM_ZONE to oLPNs UI . Allowing this to also populate on the FIRST ZONE column for oLPNs not utilizing zone picking. *N ote, there is no system code enablement for this change. * TOC     1. Item Inventory by Location UI Changes  1. oLPN UI Changes Open Filter Layout UI . Search LPN_OUTBOUND i n object Type. Select ‘Add’ Copy details below . PICK_DETRM_ZONE PULL_ZONE Save. Open Labor Dev Tools UI. Whap319 to login. Ctrl-F Clear Filter Layout Cache Open oLPNs UI to see changes.
